card.name: Plot Hole
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Ensemble Cast
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library at any time. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a permanent spell from the top of your library if its mana value is 2 or less or if it's legendary.

card.name: Executive Meddling
card.text: Destroy target creature, enchantment, or planeswalker you don't control. Its controller draws two cards, then you draw a card.

card.name: Leading Lady
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. {2}{W}: Until end of turn, another target creature you control can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.

card.name: Fade to Black
card.text: Counter target spell. If that spell targeted you or a permanent you control, draw a card.

card.name: Cold Open
card.text: Tap target artifact or creature an opponent controls. Put three stun counters on it. Draw a card.

card.name: Break a Leg
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2. Whenever one or more chapter abilities you control trigger, enchanted creature's controller loses 2 life.

card.name: Sequel Hook
card.text: Choose target creature you control. Until end of turn, it gets +2/+0 and gains "Which this creature dies, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control, then you may put a lore counter on a Saga you control."

card.name: Post-Credit Scene
card.text: Organize 2—{1}{B}{B} (You may cast this spell by paying {1}{B}{B} and tapping two creatures you control.) Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Smashing Success
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+1 until end of turn and up to one other target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Action Blockbuster
card.text: (Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.)

card.name: Soundtrack Composer
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Training Montage
card.text: When this enchantment enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it attacks, double the number of +1/+1 counters on that creature.

card.name: Simic Cinematographer
card.text: Reach Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with mana value 4 or greater, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and untap it.

card.name: Silverwood Clapboard
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {3}, {T}: For each Saga you control, you may put a lore counter on that Saga or remove a lore counter from it. Activate only as a sorcery

card.name: Intrepid Camerabot
card.text: Vigilance Whenever another permanent you control entering causes a triggered ability of that permanent to trigger, you may pay {2}. If you do, copy that triggered ability. You may choose new targets for it.

card.name: Instigator Dragon
card.text: Flying, first strike When this creature enters, another target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: On-Set Menagerie
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has "{T}: Add two mana of any one color." {4}{R}{G}, Sacrifice this Aura: Put four +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. It gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Trained Varmint
card.text: This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters, a deathtouch counter, and a lifelink counter on it. When this creature dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Get the Shot
card.text: Organize 2—{2}{G}{U} (You may cast this spell by paying {2}{G}{U} and tapping two creatures you control.) Draw three cards. You may put up to two land cards from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Blood Bag Innovator
card.text: Menace, lifelink This creature can't block. Whenever this creature attack, you may sacrifice another nonland permanent. If you do, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Combat Choreographer
card.text: Double strike Whenever this creature attacks, you may tap another untapped creature you control. If you do, tap target creature defending player controls.

card.name: Only Mostly Dead
card.text: Exile up to one target creature you control and up to one target creature card in your graveyard, then return each card exiled this way to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control.

card.name: Gruelling Conditions
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you may sacrifice another enchantment or creature. If you do, draw two cards. Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Director of Photomancy
card.text: Flash At the beginning of your end step, if you control two or more tapped creatures, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and you gain 2 life.

card.name: G.E.I.S.T. Organizer
card.text: Flying Whenever a non-Saga enchantment you control enters or you put a lore counter on a Saga you control, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Overproductive Assistant
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Servo artifact creature token. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with mana value 4 or greater, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card

card.name: Budget Balancer
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you control two or more tapped creatures, create a Treasure token. Sacrifice two Treasures you control: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Casting Call
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Performer creature tokens. When you do, choose target creature you control. Until end of turn, that creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control and gains haste.

card.name: Shock Twist
card.text: Organize 2—{U}{R} (You may cast this spell by paying {U}{R} and tapping two creatures you control.) Shock Twist deals 4 damage to target creature. Target player draws two cards, then discards a card.

card.name: Down and Dirty Director
card.text: Creatures you control with counters on them can't be blocked by more than one creature. {6}{B}{G}: Each opponent loses 3 life. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each counter on a permanent you control. Activate this ability only once each turn and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Freelance Scriptwriter
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, look at the top six cards of your library. You may reveal a Saga, Bard, or Performer card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Previsualization
card.text: Orrganize 1—{2}{U} (You may cast this spell by paying paying {2}{U} and tapping a creature you control.) Scry 2, then draw two cards.

card.name: Agorakh, Demanding Costar
card.text: Menace When Agorakh enters, he deals 4 damage to target creature you control. Excess damage is dealt to you instead.

card.name: Breakneck, Martial Costar
card.text: First strike Renown 1 (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes renowned.) Whenever Breackneck attacks while renowned, other creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Cord, Exuberant Costar
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, choose one. If that spell had mana value 4 or greater, choose one or both instead. • Create a 1/1 colorless Servo artifact creature token. • Put a +1/+1 counter on Cord.

card.name: Derist, Reoccuring Costar
card.text: Flying Whenever Derist attacks, if you sacrificed a Saga this turn, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Ellik, Egotistical Costar
card.text: Ellik enters with a +1/+1 counter on him. Whenever you put one or more counters on another permanent you control, you gain 1 life and put a +1/+1 counter on Ellik. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Firdi, Icy Costar
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) At the beginning of your end step, if you control two or more tapped creatures, tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Gnasher, Wildborn Costar
card.text: Trample Whenever Gnasher deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. If you control another attacking creature with power 4 or greater, create two Treasure tokens instead.

card.name: Miche, Adaptable Costar
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with mana value 4 or greater, up to one target creature you control has base power and toughness 4/4 until end of turn.

card.name: Verat, Unnerving Costar
card.text: Flying When Verat enters, surveil X, where X is the greatest power among creatures that entered under your control this turn. (To surveil X, look at the top X cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Yumeko, Graceful Costar
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Saga you control and each Saga card in your graveyard. When Yumeko enters, you draw a card, then you may remove a lore counter from each of any number of Sagas you control. You gain 2 life plus an additional 2 life for each lore counter removed this way.

card.name: Bretagard Village
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. {G}{W}, Discard this card: For each permanent you control with one or more counters on it, you may put a counter on that permanent of each kind already on it.

card.name: Hunting Territory
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {G}. {3}{R}{G}, Discard this card: Target attacking creature gains double strike and trample until end of turn

card.name: Shady Dojo
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. {2}{U}{B}, Discard this card: Create two 1/1 blue Ninja creature tokens with "This token can't be blocked."

card.name: Skyclave Vantage
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. {1}{W}{U}, Discard this card: Return target spell to its owner's hand. Scry 1.

card.name: Yawgmoth's Altar
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. {3}{B}{R}, Discard this card: Draw two cards. Each player loses 2 life.

card.name: Aurora Expanse
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {G} or {U}. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Elegant Garden
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {G} or {W}. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Haunted Interior
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {U} or {B}. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Highfalutin Tavern
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {R} or {W}. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Jungle Base
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {R} or {G}. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Lively Ballroom
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {B} or {R}. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Local Bazaar
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {W} or {U}. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Reclaimed Lab
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {B} or {G}. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Scientific Retreat
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {U} or {R}. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Stark Graveyard
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, add {W} or {B}. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Flubbed Stunt
card.text: Organize 1—{1}{W} (You may cast this spell by paying {1}{W} and tapping one creatures you control.) Flubbed Stunt deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If you paid this spell's organize cost, exile that creature instead.

card.name: Fashionably Late
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. When it enters, exile that creature, then return it to the battlefield.

card.name: Vault Fire
card.text: Choose one— • Vault Fire deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker. • Destroy target artifact. Vault Fire deals 2 damage to that artifact's controller.

card.name: Blacklist
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls. Search its controller's graveyard, hand, and library for any number of cards with the same name as that permanent and exile them. That player shuffles, then draws a card for each card exiled from their hand this way.

card.name: Costuming Specialist
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, you may search your library for an Aura, Equipment, or Saga card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Generational Hire
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. When this creature leaves the battlefield, you may put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Fresh Buttery Popcorn
card.text: When this artifact enters, put a lore counter on or remove a lore counter from up to one target Saga you control. Scry 1. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You draw a card and gain 3 life.

card.name: Forgot Your Lines
card.text: Choose one— • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {4}. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Reshoot
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell. That spell's controller draws a card.

card.name: Stage Fright
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature is a Coward with base power 1. (It loses all other creature types.) When enchanted creature becomes tapped or is dealt damage, its owner shuffles it into their library.

card.name: Illicit Distributor
card.text: When this creature enters, you may exile an instant or sorcery card with mana value 6 or less from your hand or graveyard. If you do, create a Saga enchantment token named Pirated Rip with "r{3} - You may cast the exiled spell without paying its mana cost. If you don't cast it this way, return it to your hand."

card.name: Make-Up Crew
card.text: When this creature enters, you may choose a creature you control and another creature. If you do, the first creature becomes a copy of the second creature.

card.name: Merchandising
card.text: Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature has ward {2}. When this Aura enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a token that's a copy of enchanted creature except it's a 1/1 Toy artifact in addition to its other types and isn't legendary.

card.name: Caustic Critic
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and discards a card.

card.name: Dashing Antihero
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, another target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control" until end of turn.

card.name: Geist Star
card.text: Flash Whenever one or more chapter abilities you control trigger, you may pay 1 life. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Jilted Hypotenuse
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy up to one target creature you don't control. You lose life equal to that creature's power.

card.name: Cut the Footage
card.text: Kicker {1}{R} (You may pay an additional {1}{R} as you cast this spell.) Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of those cards until the end of your next turn. If this spell was kicked, instead exile the top three cards of your library. You may play two of those cards until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Experienced Grip
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Temporary Team-Up
card.text: One or two target creatures each get +1/+0 and gain first strike and haste until end of turn. You gain control of one of those creatures until end of turn. Untap those creatures.

card.name: Uruha, Heartthrob
card.text: Trample When Uruha enters, if he was cast, you may sacrifice X Treasures. When you do, gain control of up to X target creatures that each have a different mana value X or less until end of turn. Those creatures gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Animal Handler
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Non-Human creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter.

card.name: Handled Hydra
card.text: Trample This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each other creature you control, plus an additional +1/+1 counter on it for each other Performer you control. Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature instead if that creature was a Performer.

card.name: Location Scouting
card.text: Search you library of up to two land cards and reveal them. Put any number of basic land cards revealed this way onto the battlefield tapped and each card not put onto the battlefield this way into your hand. Then shuffle.

card.name: Single-Minded Painter
card.text: Enchantment spells you control can't be countered. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast enchantment spells. {T}: Add one mana of any color among enchantments you control.

card.name: Clever Callbacks
card.text: Enchantment spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control triggers, the first chapter ability of that Saga triggers. (You still sacrifice it after those triggers resolve.)

card.name: Killer Clown
card.text: Trample Ward—Pay 2 life During your turn, each noncreature spell you cast has spectacle. Its spectacle cost is equal to its mana cost reduced by {2}. (You may cast a spell for its spectacle cost rather than its mana cost if an opponent lost life this turn.)

card.name: Squelch, Viscous Costar
card.text: Whenever Squelch enters or attacks, exile up to two target cards from a single graveyard. If a creature card is exiled this way, put a +1/+1 counter on Squelch. {2}{BG}, Remove three +1/+1 counters from among creatures you control: Return target creature card you own exiled with Squelch to your hand.

card.name: Femock, Prop Elemental
card.text: Femock is all colors. (Even when it isn't on the battlefield.) {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Chew the Scenery
card.text: Choose one— • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. • Destroy target noncreature artifact or noncreature enchantment.
